name: 21 Golf Range Powered by Toptracer
about: 21 Golf Range is a modern, state-of-the-art golf driving range and simulator venue located in Palisades Park, New Jersey. It features a large Toptracer range with 54 heated and covered bays, equipped with automatic tees and temperature control, ensuring a comfortable experience year-round. The facility also offers three private rooms equipped with Golfzon simulators, which can accommodate up to six players. The venue is positioned as a premier golf destination near New York City, Bergen County, and Jersey City, offering a tech-driven experience with ball tracking technology and various interactive games.
why_golfers_like_it: 54 heated and covered bays with automatic tee-up system for year-round play
All bays feature Toptracer technology for a fun, tech-driven experience
Three private rooms with the world's best Golfzon simulators accommodating up to 6 players

food_and_drink.notes: On-site cafe, Cafe 21, offering food and beverages

simulator_hardware.notes: World's Best Golfzon simulators in 3 large private rooms

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are expected to bring their own clubs for both the Toptracer range and simulator sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not mentioned; however, the venue has Cafe 21 on-site for food and beverage options.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time for 18 holes depends on the chosen simulator or activity, but simulator sessions are booked per hour, with rooms accommodating up to 6 players.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, 21 Golf Range is designed as a family-friendly facility with a heated range, putting area, and interactive games suitable for all ages.
